title: pyrus parva
intro: Pyrus parva, also known as the Dwarf Pear or Small Pear, is a species of pear tree native to China and Korea. This deciduous tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pyrus parva include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the fruit, leaves, and bark of Pyrus parva are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate digestive discomfort.
